taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
core_skills: Data engineering, Python, PostgreSQL, Relational databases, Data modeling
skill_match_scores: Data engineering:1.0, Python:1.0, PostgreSQL:1.0, Relational databases:1.0, Data modeling:1.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years of professional experience in data engineering, Programming proficiency in python, Experience with PostgreSQL or other relational databases, Proven experience in data modeling and database design, Experience with ETL design, implementation, and maintenance, Knowledge of data warehousing solutions, particularly Snowflake, Understanding of development workflows and best practices, Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail, Strong communication and collaboration skills, Ability to work independently and as part of a team
preferred_quals: Experience with data quality management and monitoring tools, Familiarity with AWS services, Familiarity with data visualization techniques and tools, Knowledge of machine learning pipelines and tools, Experience with real-time data streaming platforms, Familiarity with DBT, Airflow
core_responsibilities: Completely own our data pipeline, playing a crucial role in designing, implementing, and maintaining our data infrastructure and ETL pipelines, Lead the engineering team in making sure all code processes produce meaningful data that is stored in a performant manner, Build and maintain high-quality data solutions and large-scale data pipelines that process vast amounts of data, Optimize data flow and collection for cross-functional teams, Design core data objects and models for the entire company, Implement and maintain data quality checks and monitoring systems, Develop client-facing reporting solutions, Support data-driven decision-making through the creation of metrics datasets and dashboards, Collaborate across teams to optimize and improve data quality while delivering user-centric experiences
job_summary: EliseAI is focused on improving housing and healthcare industries by integrating AI agents into workflows to enhance efficiency and reduce costs. As a Senior Data Engineer, you will play a key role in building and maintaining data infrastructure, optimizing data flow, and supporting data-driven decision-making across the organization.
